Hero.description: Self-taught developer since 2019. 4 years of Flutter expertise — apps shipped on Play Store & App Store.

Skills.title: Technical Expertise
Skills.subtitle: A versatile tech stack focused on high-performance mobile and web solutions.

Experience.title: Professional Experience
Experience.subtitle: My journey through different roles and companies.

item0.description: Development and maintenance of Flutter mobile applications. Autonomous management of a complex client project — Flutter mobile architecture + C# backend integration. Delivered projects: Application & Miabé Hackathon Website.

item1.description: Taking over and finalizing an existing codebase until publication on App Store & Play Store. Complete redesign of an application after UX analysis — delivered in one week. 2 apps published on stores.

item2.description: State project for digitizing land titles of the national land registry in Lome. Quality control and analysis of entered data.

Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.subtitle: A selection of my recent work in mobile and web development.

item0.title: Grand Voyageur
item0.description: Carpooling app designed for West Africa. Find a ride or offer yours, simply.
item0.fullDescription: Grand Voyageur reimagines shared mobility in West Africa. Developed for Evee Engineering (Ivory Coast), the app allows drivers to publish their trips and passengers to book in seconds. I took charge of the entire Flutter part — Clean Architecture, state management, Java backend integration, and deployment on both stores. A six-month project in a real professional context.

item1.title: Cherish
item1.description: Create and send personalized greeting cards for every occasion. Elegant templates, sent in seconds.
item1.fullDescription: Cherish is a digital greeting card mobile application available on Android and iOS. It offers a collection of templates for birthdays, holidays, and special occasions, with an integrated micro-payment model. I designed and developed the app from scratch — design, Flutter development, payment integration, and publication on both stores. A solo project that allowed me to master the entire mobile product lifecycle.

item2.title: Ticketto
item2.description: Discover concerts, festivals, and matches near you. Book your seats and receive your tickets directly on your phone.
item2.fullDescription: Ticketto is an event ticketing application developed for Evee Engineering. It centralizes local cultural and sporting events — concerts, shows, matches — and allows users to book and receive their tickets in a few clicks. Clean interface, smooth experience, secure payment. Developed in Flutter and published on the Play Store as part of a freelance mission.

item3.title: EcoMap
item3.description: Mapping platform to visualize the environmental health of African cities — reporting dumpsites and real-time air quality.
item3.fullDescription: EcoMap is a mobile and web solution developed for the Make Afrique 2025 hackathon in Benin, where it won 3rd place. The application allows citizens to report unsanitary areas directly on an interactive map, facilitating the work of urban collection and cleaning organizations. It also integrates an air quality module to monitor the environmental health of each neighborhood. An impact project designed in a team, in limited time, for a real African problem.

item4.title: MIABE Hackathon
item4.description: The official app of the largest pan-African tech competition for students. All info on the 2026 competition, without registration, in 15 countries.
item4.fullDescription: MIABE Hackathon is the official application of the MIABE pan-African competition — the largest technology competition for students and young people in IT on the continent. With no registration required, the app provides access to all essential information about the 2026 edition: rules, schedule, participating countries, news. Available for the 15 participating countries, it was designed to be simple, fast, and accessible even with a limited connection.

item5.title: Woez
item5.description: Book local accommodations with payments adapted to West Africa. A local alternative to Booking.com.
item5.fullDescription: Woez is an accommodation booking application designed for the local West African market. Where platforms like Booking.com remain unsuited to local realities — payments, language, available offers — Woez offers a calibrated experience: local mobile payments (Mobile Money), local language interface, and an offer centered on proximity accommodations. A project starting from a real market problem.

item6.title: S-Contact
item6.description: Your instant digital business card. Create your profile, generate a QR code, and share your contact info in 3 seconds.
item6.fullDescription: S-Contact replaces paper business cards with a fluid digital experience. Users create their profile in a few clicks, generate a smart QR code in vCard format, and share it with anyone with a standard QR reader. No more manual entry or exchanging cards that get lost. Simple, fast, universal.

item7.title: Make 10
item7.description: An arithmetic puzzle game — combine colored tiles to get exactly 10. Simple, addictive, home-made.
item7.fullDescription: Make 10 is a mobile puzzle game developed with Unity — my very first published game. The principle is simple: combine one, two, three, or four numbered tiles from 1 to 9 to reach exactly 10. A learning project that introduced me to game development, gameplay logic, and the Play Store publication pipeline.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? Feel free to reach out.
